                                                      Page 2/ 35 
 
CHANGE RECORD 
When the quality of the products changes, the QuID is updated and a row is added to this table. 
The third column specifies which sections or sub-sections have been updated.  The fourth column should 
mention the reason for updating the document. Column 5 should include the names of the author(s) 
doing the changes. Including the name in column 6 shows that the document has been validated by the 
TAC/MFC PQ leader or deputy (or TAC/MFC PQ leader or the deputy). This validation means the 
document was checked for contents, formats and consistency with other documents.

ACRONYM TABLE 
Acronym Description 
Argo International profiling float network (www.argo.net) 
CTD Conductivity, Temperature, and Depth; It refers to a package of 
electronic instruments that measure these properties

GOSUD Global Ocean Surface Underway Data 
GTS Global Telecommunication System 
HF

Meteorology 
MY Multi-year 
KPI Key performance Indicator 
NODC National Oceanographic Data Center 
NRT Near Real Time 
QC Quality control 
REP Reprocessing 
ROOS Regional Ocean Observing System 
RTQC Real Time Quality Control 
SLA Sea Level Anomaly 
TAC Copernicus Marine Service Thematic Assembly Centre 
XBT Expendable Bathythermograph

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Quality Information Document (QUID) for In Situ products related to ocean physics, biogeochemistry, and waves in various regions including Global, Arctic, Baltic, Black Sea, Mediterranean, and North West Shelf.

product_line.name: In Situ Thematic Assembly Centre Regional Multiparameter MYNRT products
product_line.region: Global, Arctic, Baltic, Black Sea, Mediterranean, North West Shelf

variables.long_name: Significant wave height at sea surface
Wind speed at 10m above sea level
Wind direction from which the wind is blowing
